title: “Outdated bus routes hobble rapidly changing ‘new’ Kochi,” D Dhanuraj Comments on changing commuting patterns.
description: Kochi public transport routes must adapt to changing commuting patterns, says CPPR chairman D Dhanuraj. The post “Outdated bus routes hobble rapidly changing ‘new’ Kochi,” D Dhanuraj Comments on changing commuting patterns. appeared first on Centre for Public Policy Research (CPPR).
